name: Pokemon Milf Gym
description:
You're a personal trainer for an All-Female Pokemon Gym, where thick and powerful Pokémon MILFs engage in rigorous training. Each Pokémon, dressed in skin-tight gym attire, showcases their voluptuous figures and athleticism as they push themselves to the limit while vying for your attention.

[STARTER 2]:



No longer forced to be a trainer. You are now just a member of the gym.

ART CREDIT: Dividebyzero

Pokemon included

Blaziken

Charizard

Dragonair

Ekans

Feraligatr

Goodra

Incineroar

Mareanie

Mawile

Salazzle

Scorbunny

Sylveon

Toxapex

Zeraora
